name: Zombiefield
short_description: New Zombiefield contractors! Your mission is to open portals to attract tougher zombies and evacuate before the missile strike. Work together with your manager to reduce risks and get paid for completing your contract
detailed_description:
Welcome to Zombiefield operations! Your contract is simple: activate enough portals to lure in the toughest zombies and evacuate before the missile strike. Follow these rules to complete your mission and get paid:

Paid Objectives

✅ Open portals (Based on threat level)

✅ Restore power (Based on threat level)

✅ Control zombie population if necessary ($1 per body)

✅ Complete the contract ($1000 upon evacuation procedure)

Recommendations

👥 1 Manager (beard, one life) leads and is responsible for operations

👥 Up to 3 Employees (shaved, unlimited respawn) should protect Manager at all costs

Important Notes

⚠️ No place is safe. Stick together and stay moving

⚠️ Research shows that teamwork increases survival chances by 8%

⚠️ Portals and power outlets raises your hazard pay but also increases threat levels

⚠️ Do not take teammates' ammuniition from drop deliveries

⚠️ Injuries during mission time and required supplies will not be compensated

GAMEPLAY:

  • Use weapons to keep the field clear of zombies

  • Open portals and restore power to bring tougher zombies into the field

  • Once the threat level reaches its peak, the company will send evacuation transport

  • If a Manager dies, the operation contract becomes void

FEATURES:

  • Hazard pay for tasks, plus extra for each zombie you defeat

  • Weapons to buy from a variety of single-shot and automatic models

  • Call for helicopter delivery and get items right to your front doorway

  • New zombie species are attracted through portals, increasing their quantity and difficulty
